title: Luthra & Luthra Partner Shinoj Koshy launches SK & Partners
description: Luthra & Luthra Partner Shinoj Koshy has launched SK & Partners, as a senior-led firm handling complex cross border and domestic mandates. The firm is structured to ensure close partner involvement in every matter. It plans to grow in a selective and deliberate manner, building depth and scale over time.Koshy is an alumnus of National Law School of India University, Bangalore.He is a dual-qualified attorney (India and England & Wales) with more than two decades of experience advising
